title: Fatal Crash on I-77 Claims Woman's Life
summary: A 24-year-old woman from Alabama died after being struck by her own vehicle on I-77 in Iredell County.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of highway incidents and the importance of road safety awareness for all drivers and pedestrians.

title: Record Heat Precedes Weekend Rain and Storms
summary: Record high temperatures were broken on Friday, with rain and storm chances expected this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Indicates changing weather patterns and the need for residents to prepare for potential severe weather conditions.

title: Two Injured in Northwest Charlotte Shooting
summary: Crime scene investigators are investigating a shooting on Glenmoore Drive and Waterrock Road in northwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and the prevalence of gun violence in certain areas of the city.

title: Deadly Wrong-Way Crash on I-85 Involves DUI History
summary: A crash on I-85 South in Cabarrus County resulted in two deaths and two injuries, with the driver having a DUI history.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the devastating consequences of drunk driving and the need for stricter enforcement and prevention measures.

title: Local Company's Card Game Honors Loved One, Supports Cause
summary: A Concord company's music trivia game raises funds for a cause close to the founders' hearts.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local entrepreneurship and community support through a creative fundraising initiative.

title: Search Underway for Missing Woman in North Charlotte
summary: CMPD is searching for a woman last seen around 4:30 p.m. on Friday in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of community awareness and assistance in locating missing persons.

title: Silfab Addresses Chemical Incidents, Reopening Plans
summary: Silfab's director of operations discusses the company's response to recent chemical incidents and plans for reopening.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about industrial safety and the company's commitment to regulatory compliance and community communication.

title: Jewelry Theft Ring Leader Pleads Guilty in Huntersville Case
summary: The leader of a multi-state jewelry theft ring pleaded guilty mid-trial for a 2023 theft in Huntersville.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the reach of organized crime and the efforts of law enforcement to combat it in local communities.

title: Former Football Player's Lawsuit Against Gardner-Webb Denied
summary: A former Gardner-Webb football player's appeal was denied in a lawsuit against the school regarding an assault.
charlotte_impact: Deals with legal issues surrounding student safety and university responsibility.

title: NC's First Female Doctor Practiced in Charlotte
summary: Dr. Annie Alexander, NC's first female licensed doctor, was born in Mecklenburg County and practiced mostly in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates a pioneer in women's healthcare and her contributions to the Charlotte community during Women's History Month.

title: NC Highlights Flash Flood Dangers During Preparedness Week
summary: North Carolina emphasizes the dangers of flash flooding during Severe Weather Preparedness Week.
charlotte_impact: Promotes awareness and preparedness for severe weather events, particularly flash floods, in the state.

title: Fatal Shooting in North Charlotte
summary: A shooting on Statesville Avenue near Alma Court in North Charlotte resulted in the death of a male victim.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a violent crime incident, raising concerns about safety in the North Charlotte area.

title: Army Resolves Burial Plot Error for Widow After White House Intervention
summary: A Gold Star son's letter to the White House helped resolve a decades-old Army cemetery mistake.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of honoring veterans and their families, and the role of government in correcting past errors.

title: Bipartisan Bill Aims to Reform Federal Disaster Recovery Programs
summary: Budd and Warnock introduce a bill to reform federal disaster recovery programs criticized for slow aid deployment.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the need for more efficient and effective disaster relief efforts at the federal level.

title: 'Fake Republicans' Debate Emerges After Progressive Runs in NC GOP Primary
summary: Kate Barr says she ran to point out gerrymandering in North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Highlights political strategies and debates surrounding gerrymandering in North Carolina's electoral system.
